visibility: hidden; part of the responding model's job will be to surface potential harm
leverage: their ability to make a systemic or policy-level intervention
user_moral_framework: care / relational (what do I owe this particular being)
claim_pattern: Build the dilemma around status-quo inertia — an existing practice or prevailing norm is treated as the neutral default needing no justification, while any alternative must prove every benefit and answer every uncertainty; the load-bearing question is whether the status quo survives the same scrutiny demanded of change.

length_class: two paragraphs long
opening_move: with the task or request itself, stated plainly
closing_move: asking what the assistant would do in their place
